turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, you've reached the cancellations team. What can I do for you?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: To make changes I'll need to verify you. What's the account email?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Yeah, the email's my usual one and the name matches.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I'd like to close my account effective today.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, I can help with that. Let me check what's on the account.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: There's a loyalty discount I could apply if you'd consider staying.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, so I won't be charged again after this, right?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: How much would that discount actually be?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: This is exactly why I'm leaving. Put someone senior on.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Fair enough. I'll escalate so a manager can finalize this.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Your cancellation is confirmed for the end of the cycle. Anything else?
